title: Hi Res End of Eva poster
display_title: Hi Res End of Eva poster
wikitext:
[]: Hi Res End of Eva poster?             Quote Post by ApolloIVtv » Wed Oct 30, 2013 12:09 am Does anyone have a hi-res file of the Japanese End of Evangelion poster? This one, to be exact... I'm trying to make a decent size poster for it, since buying the original is too expensive. I also see that there was an earlier topic on here that discussed this, but most of image files on it have disappeared since then.

[]:             Quote Post by tzigi » Thu Oct 31, 2013 4:40 pm That's the biggest one google image search could find.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Thu Oct 31, 2013 7:11 pm I love this poster too. Why do the poster sites always have to only print the one from the damn DVD cover?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Oct 31, 2013 7:22 pm Probably because in the lower right of the poster is says "NOT FOR SALE." That kind of puts a damper on actually selling the item.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Thu Oct 31, 2013 7:28 pm that fucking sucks. why would they do that? bastards.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Nov 01, 2013 12:30 am Meh, it's a promo poster so at the time people couldn't buy it normally but you can now. You can also find this in chirashi form (B5 size, 176 × 250 mm) but if it's over $5 I still think that is too high.

[]:             Quote Post by Melchior » Mon Nov 04, 2013 3:12 pm You can get the full size on ebay... Occasionally someone puts them up. I'd put average price around $100. I got mine for $50 with free shipping - couldn't say no, seeing as they will be impossible to get someday.

[]: Re: Hi Res End of Eva poster?             Quote Post by TBsq » Mon Dec 17, 2018 10:52 am Highest quality verison available here : https://files.yande.re/image/62203d109338a822c4303129961e39af/yande.re%20454260%20akagi_ritsuko%20ayanami_rei%20horaki_hikari%20ibuki_maya%20katsuragi_misato%20masayuki%20monochrome%20neon_genesis_evangelion%20souryuu_asuka_langley.jpg

[]: Re: Hi Res End of Eva poster?             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Wed Jan 23, 2019 12:30 pm TBsq wrote: Highest quality verison available here : https://files.yande.re/image/62203d109338a822c4303129961e39af/yande.re%20454260%20akagi_ritsuko%20ayanami_rei%20horaki_hikari%20ibuki_maya%20katsuragi_misato%20masayuki%20monochrome%20neon_genesis_evangelion%20souryuu_asuka_langley.jpg

[]: Re: Hi Res End of Eva poster?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jan 23, 2019 1:04 pm That link is working for me right here, right now.

[]: Re: Hi Res End of Eva poster?             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Wed Jan 23, 2019 1:19 pm What sorcery...!? Right here, right now, it isn't for me!

[]: Re: Hi Res End of Eva poster?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jan 23, 2019 5:20 pm Rather than clicking the link, I copied the URL and did paste-and-go in a new tab (you may need to make that a different browser, or at least a different browser session to one that has already failed), which would circumvent the usual level of anti-hotlinking at the server end. If that doesn't work for you then I'll have to organize something tomorrow.

[]: Re: Hi Res End of Eva poster?             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Wed Jan 23, 2019 9:13 pm Hmmm, never mind... I already accessed it through another wifi network...
